description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

any.message: Element has insufficient color contrast of 4.05 (foreground color: #64748b, background color: #0a0e17, font size: 10.5pt (14px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

nodes.html: Short answer first. Evidence on demand. CI verifies the proposal.
